name: Spaghetti with Garlic and Oil II
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium-low heat.
2. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
3. Gradually add water to the pot, stirring gently. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then add the linguine and return to a boil.
5. Cook the pasta for 12 minutes or until al dente. Drain the pasta in a colander.
6. Return the drained pasta to the pot of garlic water.
7. Stir in chopped parsley and grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Serve immediately.
